name: hasavh sql agents
body_template:
{
  "query": "SELECT
  COUNT(1) OVER() AS TotalAgents,
  Agent
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT Agent
  FROM dbo.Stock
  WHERE DocumentID = 11
    AND Agent IS NOT NULL
) A
ORDER BY Agent"
}

חשבונית מס
body_template:
{
  "query": "SELECT
  COUNT(1) OVER() AS TotalRows,
  doc.*,
  calc.totalBeforeDiscount,
  calc.totalAfterDiscount,
  doc.TFtal AS totalPriceAfterTax,
  calc.totalTax,
  (doc.TFtal - doc.TFtalVat) AS totalTaxSimple
FROM dbo.Stock doc
CROSS APPLY (
  SELECT
    baseBeforeDiscount = ISNULL(doc.TFtalVat,0) + ISNULL(doc.TFtalVatFree,0),
    discFactor = CASE
      WHEN ABS(((ISNULL(doc.TFtalVat,0)+ISNULL(doc.TFtalVatFree,0))*(1-ISNULL(doc.DiscountPrc,0)/100.0) + (ISNULL(doc.TFtalVat,0)*(1-ISNULL(doc.DiscountPrc,0)/100.0))*(ISNULL(doc.VatPrc,0)/100.0)) - ISNULL(doc.TFtal,0)) <= ABS(((ISNULL(doc.TFtalVat,0)+ISNULL(doc.TFtalVatFree,0))*(1-ISNULL(doc.DiscountPrc,0)) + (ISNULL(doc.TFtalVat,0)*(1-ISNULL(doc.DiscountPrc,0)))*(ISNULL(doc.VatPrc,0)/100.0)) - ISNULL(doc.TFtal,0))
      THEN (1-ISNULL(doc.DiscountPrc,0)/100.0)
      ELSE (1-ISNULL(doc.DiscountPrc,0))
    END
) x
CROSS APPLY (
  SELECT
    totalBeforeDiscount = x.baseBeforeDiscount,
    totalAfterDiscount = ROUND(x.baseBeforeDiscount * x.discFactor, 2),
    totalTax = ROUND(ISNULL(doc.TFtal,0) - (x.baseBeforeDiscount * x.discFactor), 2)
) calc
WHERE
  ValueDate >= TRY_CONVERT(date, @dateFrom)
  AND ValueDate <= TRY_CONVERT(date, @dateTo)
  AND DocumentID = @documentType
  AND AccountKey = @userExtId
  AND (
    @search IS NULL
    OR LTRIM(RTRIM(@search)) = ''
    OR DocNumber LIKE CONCAT('%', @search, '%')
    OR AccountKey LIKE CONCAT('%', @search, '%')
    OR AccountName LIKE CONCAT('%', @search, '%')
  )
ORDER BY ValueDate DESC
OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @pageSize ROWS ONLY",
  "params": {
    "dateFrom": "{dateFrom}",
    "dateTo": "{dateTo}",
    "offset": "{offset}",
    "pageSize": "{limit}",
    "documentType": 1,
    "userExtId": "{userExtId}",
    "search": "{search}"
  }
}

CROSS APPLY (
  SELECT
    baseBeforeDiscount = ISNULL(doc.TFtalVat,0) + ISNULL(doc.TFtalVatFree,0),
    discFactor = CASE
      WHEN ABS(((ISNULL(doc.TFtalVat,0)+ISNULL(doc.TFtalVatFree,0))*(1-ISNULL(doc.DiscountPrc,0)/100.0) + (ISNULL(doc.TFtalVat,0)*(1-ISNULL(doc.DiscountPrc,0)/100.0))*(ISNULL(doc.VatPrc,0)/100.0)) - ISNULL(doc.TFtal,0)) <= ABS(((ISNULL(doc.TFtalVat,0)+ISNULL(doc.TFtalVatFree,0))*(1-ISNULL(doc.DiscountPrc,0)) + (ISNULL(doc.TFtalVat,0)*(1-ISNULL(doc.DiscountPrc,0)))*(ISNULL(doc.VatPrc,0)/100.0)) - ISNULL(doc.TFtal,0))

name: hasav sql document items
hasav_sql_purchase_history
body_template:
{
  "query": "SELECT
  sm.Quantity,
  sm.Price,
  sm.SupplyQuantity,
  sm.DiscountPrc,
  sm.TFtal,
  s1.DocNumber,
  s1.ValueDate,
  s1.DocumentID,
  s1.Status
FROM dbo.Stock AS s1
LEFT JOIN dbo.Stock AS s2
  ON s1.DocNumber = s2.Reference AND s1.AccountKey = s2.AccountKey
JOIN dbo.StockMoves AS sm
  ON sm.StockId = s1.ID
WHERE
  (s1.DocumentID IN (2,4,1,6))
  AND s1.AccountKey = @userExtId
  AND sm.ItemKey = @sku
  AND s1.ValueDate >= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
ORDER BY s1.ValueDate DESC",
  "params": {
    "userExtId": "{userExtId}",
    "sku": "{sku}"
  }
}

name: hasav_sql_purchases_by_sku_warehouses
body_template:
{
  "query": "WITH wh AS (
  SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) AS w
  FROM STRING_SPLIT(COALESCE(NULLIF(@warehousesCsv,''),''), ',')
  WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) <> ''
)
SELECT
  s1.WareHouse,
  stockData.ITEMWARHBAL AS stock,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sm.Status = 2 THEN sm.SupplyQuantity ELSE 0 END) AS committed,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sm.Status = 0 THEN sm.SupplyQuantity ELSE 0 END) AS ordered
FROM dbo.Stock AS s1
JOIN dbo.StockMoves AS sm
  ON sm.StockId = s1.ID
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT ITEMKEY, SUM(ITEMWARHBAL) AS ITEMWARHBAL
  FROM dbo.vBalItemWarehouse
  WHERE ITEMKEY = @sku AND WAREHOUSE = '10'
  GROUP BY ITEMKEY
) AS stockData
  ON stockData.ITEMKEY = sm.ItemKey
WHERE
  sm.ItemKey = @sku
  AND sm.SupplyQuantity != 0
  AND (NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM wh) OR s1.WareHouse IN (SELECT w FROM wh))
GROUP BY
  s1.WareHouse,
  stockData.ITEMWARHBAL",
  "params": {
    "sku": "{sku}",
    "warehousesCsv": "{warehousesCsv}"
  }
}

name: hasav_sql_purchase_delivery
body_template:
{
  "query": "SELECT
  SM.ItemKey,
  S1.DocNumber,

  SM.Status
FROM dbo.Stock AS S1

  AND SM.Status != '2'

ORDER BY S1.DueDate DESC",
  "params": {
    "sku": "{sku}"
  }
}

name: hasav_sql_debits
body_template:
{
"query": "SELECT
  j.StockID,
  balMatch.OPENSUF,
  balMatch.JTMDEBITCREDIT,
  j.ValueDate,
  j.DueDate,
  j.Referance
FROM dbo.VOPENJURNALMATCH AS balMatch
JOIN dbo.JurnalTrans AS j
  ON balMatch.JTID = j.TransID
WHERE
  balMatch.AACCOUNTKEY = @userExtId
  AND j.Referance != ''
  AND j.ValueDate >= TRY_CONVERT(date, @dateFrom)
  AND j.ValueDate <= TRY_CONVERT(date, @dateTo)
ORDER BY j.ValueDate, j.TransID",
  "params": {
    "dateFrom": "{dateFrom}",
    "dateTo": "{dateTo}",
    "userExtId": "{userExtId}"
  }
}

name: hasav_sql_cartesset_lines
body_template:
{
  "query": "WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    JT.TransID,
    JT.BatchNo,
    JT.TransType,
    JT.TransCredID,
    CAST(JT.ValueDate AS date) AS ValueDate,
    CAST(JT.DueDate  AS date) AS DueDate,
    JT.Referance,
    JT.Ref2,
    JT.Description,
    JTM.ID,
    JTM.DebitCredit,
    CAST(JTM.suF AS float) AS suF,
    CASE WHEN CAST(JTM.DebitCredit AS varchar(10)) = '1' THEN -CAST(JTM.suF AS float) ELSE CAST(JTM.suF AS float) END AS adjSuF
  FROM dbo.JurnalTrans AS JT
  JOIN dbo.JurnalTransMoves AS JTM
    ON JT.TransID = JTM.TransID
  WHERE
    JTM.AccountKey = @userExtId
    AND JT.Status = '1'
    AND (NULLIF(@dateFrom, '') IS NULL OR CAST(JT.ValueDate AS date) >= TRY_CONVERT(date, NULLIF(@dateFrom, '')))
    AND (NULLIF(@dateTo, '') IS NULL OR CAST(JT.ValueDate AS date) <= TRY_CONVERT(date, NULLIF(@dateTo, '')))
)
SELECT
  *,
  SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(DebitCredit AS varchar(10)) = '1' THEN suF ELSE 0 END) OVER() AS glbDeptTtL,
  SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(DebitCredit AS varchar(10)) <> '1' THEN suF ELSE 0 END) OVER() AS glbCredTtl,
  SUM(adjSuF) OVER(ORDER BY ValueDate, TransID, ID ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS Balance
FROM base
ORDER BY ValueDate, TransID, ID",
  "params": {
    "userExtId": "{userExtId}",
    "dateFrom": "{dateFrom}",
    "dateTo": "{dateTo}"
  }
}

name: hasav_sql_agent_profile_bundle
body_template:
{
  "query": "WITH DateVars AS (
  SELECT
    CONVERT(date, GETDATE()) AS StartOfToday,
    DATEADD(ms, -3, DATEADD(day, 1, CONVERT(date, GETDATE()))) AS EndOfToday,
    DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), MONTH(GETDATE()), 1) AS StartOfMonth,
    DATEADD(ms, -3, DATEADD(month, 1, DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), MONTH(GETDATE()), 1))) AS EndOfMonth
),
MonthlyStats AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(TFtalVat) AS total,
    MONTH(ValueDate) AS month,
    YEAR(ValueDate) AS year
  FROM dbo.Stock
  WHERE
    Agent =@userExtId
    AND DocumentID IN (6, 11)
    AND Status = '1'
    AND ValueDate BETWEEN TRY_CONVERT(datetime, @dateFrom) AND TRY_CONVERT(datetime, @dateTo)
  GROUP BY YEAR(ValueDate), MONTH(ValueDate)
),
TotalsChosenPeriod AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(TFtalVat) AS total,
    COUNT(*) AS totalOrders,
    AVG(TFtalVat) AS averageBasket
  FROM dbo.Stock
  WHERE
    Agent =@userExtId
    AND DocumentID IN (6, 11)
    AND Status = '1'
    AND ValueDate BETWEEN TRY_CONVERT(datetime, @dateFrom) AND TRY_CONVERT(datetime, @dateTo)
),
TotalsToday AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(TFtalVat) AS totalToday,
    COUNT(*) AS countToday
  FROM dbo.Stock, DateVars
  WHERE
    Agent =@userExtId
    AND DocumentID IN (6, 11)
    AND Status = '1'
    AND ValueDate BETWEEN DateVars.StartOfToday AND DateVars.EndOfToday
),
TotalsMonth AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(TFtalVat) AS totalMonth,
    COUNT(*) AS countMonth
  FROM dbo.Stock, DateVars
  WHERE
    Agent =@userExtId
    AND DocumentID IN (6, 11)
    AND Status = '1'
    AND ValueDate BETWEEN DateVars.StartOfMonth AND DateVars.EndOfMonth
)
SELECT
  (SELECT * FROM MonthlyStats FOR JSON PATH) AS monthlyStats,
  (SELECT * FROM TotalsChosenPeriod FOR JSON PATH, WITHOUT_ARRAY_WRAPPER) AS totalsChosen,
  (SELECT * FROM TotalsToday FOR JSON PATH, WITHOUT_ARRAY_WRAPPER) AS totalsToday,
  (SELECT * FROM TotalsMonth FOR JSON PATH, WITHOUT_ARRAY_WRAPPER) AS totalsMonth",
  "params": {
    "userExtId": "{userExtId}",
    "dateFrom": "{dateFrom}",
    "dateTo": "{dateTo}"
  }
}

name: hasav_sql_sales_cycles
body_template:
{
  "query": "SELECT
  SUM(CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(month, S.ValueDate, GETDATE()) = 1 THEN S.TFtal ELSE 0 END) AS sumPreviousMonthCurrentYear,
  SUM(CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(month, S.ValueDate, GETDATE()) = 13 THEN S.TFtal ELSE 0 END) AS sumPreviousMonthPreviousYear,
  SUM(CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(month, S.ValueDate, GETDATE()) IN (1, 2, 3) THEN S.TFtal ELSE 0 END) / 3.0 AS averageLastThreeMonths
FROM dbo.Stock S
WHERE
  S.AccountKey = @userExtId
  AND S.DocumentID IN (6, 11)
  AND S.TFtal IS NOT NULL
  AND DATEDIFF(month, S.ValueDate, GETDATE()) IN (1, 2, 3, 13)",
  "params": {
    "userExtId": "{userExtId}"
  }
}

name: hasav_sql_items_sales_cycles
body_template:
{
  "query": "SELECT
  SM.ItemKey,
  SM.ItemName,
  SUM(CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(month, S.ValueDate, GETDATE()) = 1 THEN SM.Quantity ELSE 0 END) AS sumPreviousMonthCurrentYear,
  SUM(CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(month, S.ValueDate, GETDATE()) = 13 THEN SM.Quantity ELSE 0 END) AS sumPreviousMonthPreviousYear,
  SUM(CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(month, S.ValueDate, GETDATE()) IN (1, 2, 3) THEN SM.Quantity ELSE 0 END) / 3.0 AS averageLastThreeMonths
FROM dbo.Stock S
JOIN dbo.StockMoves SM
  ON S.ID = SM.StockID
WHERE
  S.AccountKey = @userExtId
  AND S.DocumentID IN (6, 11)
  AND S.Status = 1
  AND DATEDIFF(month, S.ValueDate, GETDATE()) IN (1, 2, 3, 13)
GROUP BY SM.ItemKey, SM.ItemName",
  "params": {
    "userExtId": "{userExtId}"
  }
}

body_template:
{
  "query": "SELECT
  Users = (
    SELECT TOP (1)
      a.*,
      ct.SplitJurnalMoves,
      ct.Details AS CreditTermsDetails,
      ct.CurrenF,
      ct.Month,
      ct.Days,
      ct.SharePrc,
      ct.TemF
    FROM dbo.Accounts AS a
    LEFT JOIN dbo.CreditTerms AS ct
      ON ct.CreditTermsCode = a.CreditTermsCode
    WHERE a.AccountKey = @userExtId
    FOR JSON PATH, WITHOUT_ARRAY_WRAPPER, INCLUDE_NULL_VALUES
  ),

  Totals = (
    SELECT
      TotalOrderSum = COALESCE(t.TotalOrderSum, 0),
      MinDate = mm.MinDate,
      MaxDate = mm.MaxDate,
      OrdersQuantity = COALESCE(mm.OrdersQuantity, 0),
      MonthsQuantityByOrderDates = CASE
        WHEN mm.MinDate IS NULL OR mm.MaxDate IS NULL THEN 0
        ELSE DATEDIFF(
          MONTH,
          DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(mm.MinDate), MONTH(mm.MinDate), 1),
          DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(mm.MaxDate), MONTH(mm.MaxDate), 1)
        ) + 1
      END,
      MonthlyAverage = CASE
        WHEN mm.MinDate IS NULL OR mm.MaxDate IS NULL THEN 0
        ELSE COALESCE(t.TotalOrderSum, 0) * 1.0 / NULLIF(
          DATEDIFF(
            MONTH,
            DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(mm.MinDate), MONTH(mm.MinDate), 1),
            DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(mm.MaxDate), MONTH(mm.MaxDate), 1)
          ) + 1,
          0
        )
      END,
      MonthlyObjective = 0,
      TotalOrderSumCurrentMonth = COALESCE(cm.TotalOrderSumCurrentMonth, 0),
      lastMonthIncome = COALESCE(lm.lastMonthIncome, 0),
      lastMonthPurchPriceSum = 0,
      warningBalance = COALESCE(ub.UserBalance, 0) + COALESCE(cq.Cheqs, 0)
    FROM (SELECT 1 AS x) base
    CROSS APPLY (
      SELECT
        TotalOrderSum =
          SUM(CASE WHEN DocumentID IN ('1','2','9','37') THEN TFtalVat ELSE 0 END)
        - SUM(CASE WHEN DocumentID = '3' THEN TFtalVat ELSE 0 END)
      FROM dbo.Stock
      WHERE AccountKey = @userExtId
        AND DocumentID IN ('1','2','9','37','3')
        AND Status = '1'
    ) t
    CROSS APPLY (
      SELECT
        MinDate = MIN(ValueDate),
        MaxDate = MAX(ValueDate),
        OrdersQuantity = COUNT(*)
      FROM dbo.Stock
      WHERE AccountKey = @userExtId
        AND DocumentID = '11'
        AND Status = '1'
    ) mm
    CROSS APPLY (
      SELECT
        TotalOrderSumCurrentMonth =
          SUM(CASE WHEN DocumentID IN ('1','2','9','37') THEN TFtalVat ELSE 0 END)
        - SUM(CASE WHEN DocumentID = '3' THEN TFtalVat ELSE 0 END)
      FROM dbo.Stock
      WHERE AccountKey = @userExtId
        AND DocumentID IN ('1','2','9','37','3')
        AND Status = '1'
        AND ValueDate BETWEEN d.startOfMonth AND n.now
    ) cm
    CROSS APPLY (
      SELECT
        lastMonthIncome =
          SUM(CASE WHEN DocumentID IN ('1','2','9','37') THEN TFtalVat ELSE 0 END)
        - SUM(CASE WHEN DocumentID = '3' THEN TFtalVat ELSE 0 END)
      FROM dbo.Stock
      WHERE AccountKey = @userExtId
        AND DocumentID IN ('1','2','9','37','3')
        AND Status = '1'
        AND ValueDate BETWEEN m.prevMonth AND m.thisMonth
    ) lm
    FOR JSON PATH, WITHOUT_ARRAY_WRAPPER, INCLUDE_NULL_VALUES
  ),

  Cheqs = COALESCE(cq.Cheqs, 0),

  CheqsList = (
    SELECT
      s1.DocumentID,
      s1.DocNumber,
      ch.CheqNumber,
      ch.SuF,
      ch.ValueDate,
      s1.ValueDate AS DocValueDate
    FROM dbo.Stock AS s1
    JOIN dbo.Cheqs AS ch
      ON s1.Id = ch.StockID
    WHERE s1.AccountKey = @userExtId
      AND s1.DocumentID IN ('1','9','37','31')
      AND ch.ValueDate > d.startOfToday
    ORDER BY ch.ValueDate, s1.DocNumber
    FOR JSON PATH, INCLUDE_NULL_VALUES
  ),

  OpenDebtInvoices = (
    SELECT
      j.StockID,
      balMatch.OPENSUF,
      balMatch.JTMDEBITCREDIT,
      j.ValueDate,
      j.DueDate,
      j.Referance
    FROM dbo.VOPENJURNALMATCH AS balMatch
    JOIN dbo.JurnalTrans AS j
      ON balMatch.JTID = j.TransID
    WHERE balMatch.AACCOUNTKEY = @userExtId
    ORDER BY j.ValueDate, j.TransID
    FOR JSON PATH, INCLUDE_NULL_VALUES
  )
FROM (SELECT GETDATE() AS now) n
CROSS APPLY (
  SELECT
    startOfToday = DATEADD(DAY, DATEDIFF(DAY, 0, n.now), 0),
    startOfMonth = DATEADD(MONTH, DATEDIFF(MONTH, 0, n.now), 0)
) d
CROSS APPLY (
  SELECT
    thisMonth = d.startOfMonth,
    prevMonth = DATEADD(MONTH, -1, d.startOfMonth)
) m
CROSS APPLY (
  SELECT TOP (1) UserBalance = a.Balance
  FROM dbo.Accounts AS a
  WHERE a.AccountKey = @userExtId
) ub
CROSS APPLY (
  SELECT Cheqs = COALESCE(SUM(ch.SuF), 0)
  FROM dbo.Stock AS s1
  JOIN dbo.Cheqs AS ch
    ON s1.Id = ch.StockID
  WHERE s1.AccountKey = @userExtId
    AND s1.DocumentID IN ('1','9','37','31')
    AND ch.ValueDate > d.startOfToday
) cq",
  "params": {
    "userExtId": "{userExtId}"
  }
}

name: keep alert
body_template:
{
  "query": "WITH r AS (
  SELECT
    userExtId = @userExtId,
    toDate = CAST(GETDATE() AS date),
    fromDate = DATEADD(YEAR, -2, CAST(GETDATE() AS date)),
    currentMonthStart = DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), MONTH(GETDATE()), 1),
    previousMonthNumber = MONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, -1, DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), MONTH(GETDATE()), 1))),
    currentYear = YEAR(GETDATE())
),
base AS (
  SELECT
    s.ID,
    s.ValueDate,
    [year] = YEAR(s.ValueDate),
    [month] = MONTH(s.ValueDate),
    monthStart = DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(s.ValueDate), MONTH(s.ValueDate), 1),
    amount = COALESCE(s.TFtalVat, 0.0),
    monthDiff = DATEDIFF(MONTH, DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(s.ValueDate), MONTH(s.ValueDate), 1), r.currentMonthStart),
    r.previousMonthNumber
  FROM dbo.Stock AS s
  CROSS JOIN r
  WHERE s.AccountKey = r.userExtId
    AND s.DocumentID = 11
    AND s.Status = 1
    AND ISNULL(s.DocCancel, 0) = 0
    AND s.ValueDate >= r.fromDate
    AND s.ValueDate < DATEADD(DAY, 1, r.toDate)
),
prev_month_by_year AS (
  SELECT
    b.[year],
    sumAmount = SUM(b.amount)
  FROM base AS b
  WHERE b.[month] = b.previousMonthNumber
  GROUP BY b.[year]
),
monthly AS (
  SELECT
    b.monthStart,
    monthSum = SUM(b.amount)
  FROM base AS b
  GROUP BY b.monthStart
),
monthly_last12 AS (
  SELECT
    b.monthStart,
    monthSum = SUM(b.amount)
  FROM base AS b
  WHERE b.monthDiff BETWEEN 1 AND 12
  GROUP BY b.monthStart
),
agg AS (
  SELECT
    averageLastThreeMonths = AVG(CASE WHEN b.monthDiff BETWEEN 1 AND 3 THEN b.amount * 1.0 END),
    sumLast12Months = COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN b.monthDiff BETWEEN 1 AND 12 THEN b.amount ELSE 0 END), 0.0),
    invoiceCountLast12Months = COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN b.monthDiff BETWEEN 1 AND 12 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0),
    sumCurrentMonth = COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN b.monthDiff = 0 THEN b.amount ELSE 0 END), 0.0),
    countCurrentMonth = COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN b.monthDiff = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0),
    sumPrevMonth = COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN b.monthDiff = 1 THEN b.amount ELSE 0 END), 0.0),
    countPrevMonth = COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN b.monthDiff = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0),
    sumSameMonthLastYear = COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN b.monthDiff = 12 THEN b.amount ELSE 0 END), 0.0),
    countSameMonthLastYear = COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN b.monthDiff = 12 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0),
    sumLast24Months = COALESCE(SUM(b.amount), 0.0),
    invoiceCountLast24Months = COUNT(1),
    minOrderAmount = COALESCE(MIN(b.amount), 0.0),
    maxOrderAmount = COALESCE(MAX(b.amount), 0.0),
    lastOrderDate = MAX(b.ValueDate)
  FROM base AS b
),
ordered AS (
  SELECT
    b.ID,
    b.ValueDate,
    prevValueDate = LAG(b.ValueDate) OVER (ORDER BY b.ValueDate, b.ID)
  FROM base AS b
),
intervals AS (
  SELECT
    avgDaysBetweenOrders = AVG(CAST(DATEDIFF(DAY, o.prevValueDate, o.ValueDate) AS float))
  FROM ordered AS o
  WHERE o.prevValueDate IS NOT NULL
),
stats AS (
  SELECT
    r.currentYear,
    previousYear = r.currentYear - 1,
    averageLastThreeMonths = COALESCE(a.averageLastThreeMonths, 0.0),
    sumLast12Months = a.sumLast12Months,
    invoiceCountLast12Months = a.invoiceCountLast12Months,
    monthsActiveLast12 = COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(1) FROM monthly_last12), 0),
    stdDevMonthlyLast12 = COALESCE((SELECT STDEVP(m12.monthSum) FROM monthly_last12 AS m12), 0.0),
    sumPrevMonthCurrentYear = COALESCE((SELECT pmy.sumAmount FROM prev_month_by_year AS pmy WHERE pmy.[year] = r.currentYear), 0.0),
    sumPrevMonthPrevYear = COALESCE((SELECT pmy.sumAmount FROM prev_month_by_year AS pmy WHERE pmy.[year] = r.currentYear - 1), 0.0),
    sumCurrentMonth = a.sumCurrentMonth,
    countCurrentMonth = a.countCurrentMonth,
    sumPrevMonth = a.sumPrevMonth,
    countPrevMonth = a.countPrevMonth,
    sumSameMonthLastYear = a.sumSameMonthLastYear,
    countSameMonthLastYear = a.countSameMonthLastYear,
    sumLast24Months = a.sumLast24Months,
    invoiceCountLast24Months = a.invoiceCountLast24Months,
    monthsActiveLast24 = COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(1) FROM monthly), 0),
    stdDevMonthlyLast24 = COALESCE((SELECT STDEVP(m24.monthSum) FROM monthly AS m24), 0.0),
    minOrderAmount = a.minOrderAmount,
    maxOrderAmount = a.maxOrderAmount,
    daysSinceLastOrder = COALESCE(DATEDIFF(DAY, a.lastOrderDate, r.toDate), 0),
    avgDaysBetweenOrders = COALESCE(i.avgDaysBetweenOrders, 0.0)
  FROM r
  CROSS JOIN agg AS a
  CROSS JOIN intervals AS i
),
list_unpivoted AS (
  SELECT
    sortOrder = 100 + ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pmy.[year]),
    label = CONCAT(N'סכום חודש שעבר (', pmy.[year], N')'),
    value = CAST(ROUND(pmy.sumAmount, 2) AS decimal(18,2))
  FROM prev_month_by_year AS pmy

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 200, N'הפרש חודש שעבר מול שנה קודמת (₪)', CAST(ROUND(s.sumPrevMonthCurrentYear - s.sumPrevMonthPrevYear, 2) AS decimal(18,2)) FROM stats AS s
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 210, N'הפרש אחוזי חודש שעבר מול שנה קודמת (%)', CAST(ROUND(COALESCE(((s.sumPrevMonthCurrentYear - s.sumPrevMonthPrevYear) * 100.0) / NULLIF(s.sumPrevMonthPrevYear, 0), 0), 2) AS decimal(18,2)) FROM stats AS s
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 300, N'ממוצע 3 חודשים אחרונים', CAST(ROUND(s.averageLastThreeMonths, 2) AS decimal(18,2)) FROM stats AS s
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 310, N'סכום 12 חודשים אחרונים', CAST(ROUND(s.sumLast12Months, 2) AS decimal(18,2)) FROM stats AS s
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 320, N'ממוצע חודשי 12 חודשים אחרונים', CAST(ROUND(COALESCE(s.sumLast12Months / NULLIF(CAST(s.monthsActiveLast12 AS float), 0), 0), 2) AS decimal(18,2)) FROM stats AS s
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 330, N'מספר חודשים פעילים ב-12 חודשים אחרונים', CAST(s.monthsActiveLast12 AS decimal(18,2)) FROM stats AS s
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 340, N'מספר מסמכים (הזמנות) ב-12 חודשים אחרונים', CAST(s.invoiceCountLast12Months AS decimal(18,2)) FROM stats AS s
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 350, N'ממוצע לסל קניה ב-12 חודשים אחרונים', CAST(ROUND(COALESCE(s.sumLast12Months / NULLIF(CAST(s.invoiceCountLast12Months AS float), 0), 0), 2) AS decimal(18,2)) FROM stats AS s
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 360, N'סטיית תקן חודשית 12 חודשים (פיזור מכירות)', CAST(ROUND(s.stdDevMonthlyLast12, 2) AS decimal(18,2)) FROM stats AS s
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 370, N'חודש שעבר / ממוצע 12 חודשים (%)', CAST(ROUND(COALESCE((s.sumPrevMonthCurrentYear * 100.0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(s.sumLast12Months / NULLIF(CAST(s.monthsActiveLast12 AS float), 0), 0), 0), 0), 2) AS decimal(18,2)) FROM stats AS s
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 410, N'סכום חודש נוכחי', CAST(ROUND(s.sumCurrentMonth, 2) AS decimal(18,2)) FROM stats AS s
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 420, N'מספר מסמכים בחודש נוכחי', CAST(s.countCurrentMonth AS decimal(18,2)) FROM stats AS s
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 430, N'סכום חודש קודם', CAST(ROUND(s.sumPrevMonth, 2) AS decimal(18,2)) FROM stats AS s
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 440, N'מספר מסמכים בחודש קודם', CAST(s.countPrevMonth AS decimal(18,2)) FROM stats AS s
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 450, N'שינוי חודש נוכחי מול חודש קודם (₪)', CAST(ROUND(s.sumCurrentMonth - s.sumPrevMonth, 2) AS decimal(18,2)) FROM stats AS s
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 460, N'שינוי חודש נוכחי מול חודש קודם (%)', CAST(ROUND(COALESCE(((s.sumCurrentMonth - s.sumPrevMonth) * 100.0) / NULLIF(s.sumPrevMonth, 0), 0), 2) AS decimal(18,2)) FROM stats AS s
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 470, N'שינוי חודש נוכחי מול אותו חודש אשתקד (₪)', CAST(ROUND(s.sumCurrentMonth - s.sumSameMonthLastYear, 2) AS decimal(18,2)) FROM stats AS s
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 480, N'שינוי חודש נוכחי מול אותו חודש אשתקד (%)', CAST(ROUND(COALESCE(((s.sumCurrentMonth - s.sumSameMonthLastYear) * 100.0) / NULLIF(s.sumSameMonthLastYear, 0), 0), 2) AS decimal(18,2)) FROM stats AS s
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 510, N'סכום 24 חודשים אחרונים', CAST(ROUND(s.sumLast24Months, 2) AS decimal(18,2)) FROM stats AS s
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 520, N'ממוצע חודשי 24 חודשים אחרונים', CAST(ROUND(COALESCE(s.sumLast24Months / NULLIF(CAST(s.monthsActiveLast24 AS float), 0), 0), 2) AS decimal(18,2)) FROM stats AS s
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 530, N'מספר חודשים פעילים ב-24 חודשים אחרונים', CAST(s.monthsActiveLast24 AS decimal(18,2)) FROM stats AS s
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 540, N'מספר מסמכים ב-24 חודשים אחרונים', CAST(s.invoiceCountLast24Months AS decimal(18,2)) FROM stats AS s
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 550, N'ממוצע לסל קניה ב-24 חודשים אחרונים', CAST(ROUND(COALESCE(s.sumLast24Months / NULLIF(CAST(s.invoiceCountLast24Months AS float), 0), 0), 2) AS decimal(18,2)) FROM stats AS s
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 560, N'סטיית תקן חודשית 24 חודשים (פיזור מכירות)', CAST(ROUND(s.stdDevMonthlyLast24, 2) AS decimal(18,2)) FROM stats AS s
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 570, N'הזמנה מינימלית ב-24 חודשים (לפני מעמ)', CAST(ROUND(s.minOrderAmount, 2) AS decimal(18,2)) FROM stats AS s
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 580, N'הזמנה מקסימלית ב-24 חודשים (לפני מעמ)', CAST(ROUND(s.maxOrderAmount, 2) AS decimal(18,2)) FROM stats AS s
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 590, N'ימים מאז הזמנה אחרונה', CAST(s.daysSinceLastOrder AS decimal(18,2)) FROM stats AS s
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 600, N'ממוצע ימים בין הזמנות', CAST(ROUND(s.avgDaysBetweenOrders, 2) AS decimal(18,2)) FROM stats AS s
),
list_numbered AS (
  SELECT
    sortOrder,
    label,
    value,
    rn = ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY sortOrder)
  FROM list_unpivoted
)
SELECT
  resultKey1 = MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN label END), resultValue1 = MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN value END),
  resultKey2 = MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 2 THEN label END), resultValue2 = MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 2 THEN value END),

  resultKey16 = MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 16 THEN label END), resultValue16 = MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 16 THEN value END),
  resultKey17 = MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 17 THEN label END), resultValue17 = MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 17 THEN value END),
  resultKey18 = MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 18 THEN label END), resultValue18 = MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 18 THEN value END),
  resultKey19 = MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 19 THEN label END), resultValue19 = MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 19 THEN value END),
  resultKey20 = MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 20 THEN label END), resultValue20 = MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 20 THEN value END),
  resultKey21 = MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 21 THEN label END), resultValue21 = MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 21 THEN value END),
  resultKey22 = MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 22 THEN label END), resultValue22 = MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 22 THEN value END),
  resultKey23 = MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 23 THEN label END), resultValue23 = MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 23 THEN value END),
  resultKey24 = MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 24 THEN label END), resultValue24 = MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 24 THEN value END),

  resultKey28 = MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 28 THEN label END), resultValue28 = MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 28 THEN value END),
  resultKey29 = MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 29 THEN label END), resultValue29 = MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 29 THEN value END),
  resultKey30 = MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 30 THEN label END), resultValue30 = MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 30 THEN value END)
FROM list_numbered",
  "params": {
    "userExtId": "{userExtId}"
  }
}

name: search product by name

body_template:
{

  SELECT COUNT(1) OVER() AS TotalRows,
         i.*
  FROM dbo.Items i
  ORDER BY i.ID ASC
  OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @pageSize ROWS ONLY
)
SELECT p.TotalRows,
       p.*,
       cat.Category
FROM Paged p

  SELECT TOP (1) en.Note AS Category
  FROM dbo.ExtraNotes en
  WHERE en.NoteID = 7
    AND en.KeF = p.ItemKey
) cat
ORDER BY p.ID ASC",
  "params": {
    "offset": {offset},
    "pageSize": {limit}
  }
}
